releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed interdimensional edges to portal nodes duplicating (#235)
- Fixed canvas encapsulation not working because of incomplete metadata computation (#232)
- Fixed frontmatter always being alphabetically sorted (#234)
- Added copy wikilink to node (#241)
- Replaced Ko-Fi donation overlay with banner

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/5.1.0...5.2.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Consider updating to version `5.2.0` to fix #235

## Changes
- Added persistent file node edges through a frontmatter property (#226)
- Added option to highlight edges that are connected with the currently selected node (#220)
- Improved backlink links (#221)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/5.0.1...5.1.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Consider updating to version `5.2.0` to fix #235

## Changes
- Fixed #224 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/5.0.0...5.0.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Consider updating to version `5.2.0` to fix #235

## Changes
- Standardized file format - [Advanced JSON Canvas](https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/tree/main/assets/formats/advanced-json-canvas)
- Full frontmatter support (#41)
- Link individual nodes using wikilinks
- Search inside a canvas file
- Persistent z-Index (#193)
- Enforce any node's ratio (#118)
- Better structured and organized settings + less features enabled by default for a more vanilla-like experience
- Internal refactoring of the Portals code

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/4.1.0...5.0.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added "Swap nodes" command (#199)
- Fixed "Auto Resize" not in popup menu (#207)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/4.0.2...4.1.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Minor changes to the settings (Should fix #198)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/4.0.1...4.0.2

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:

- Fixed image export dependent on variable breakpoints
- Now hiding collapsible group collapse/expand button on image export (#191)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/4.0.0...4.0.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added shortcuts to navigate between nodes (#25)
- Added option to hide grid in read-only mode (#189)
- Added option to disable diagonal path for A* edge pathfinding
- Massively improved performance, again (Canvas open: 1284ms -> 518ms)
- Rewrote event system for better type safety
- Removed Quicksettings

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.10.2...4.0.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Really fixed #190

releases.description:

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Changed how custom styles can be created (old syntax is still supported) (#177)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.7.4...3.8.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Improved A* pathfinding method to now respect group nodes (#170)
- Fixed Metadata Cache compatibility not working on mobile (#171)
- Improved live path updates of edges while dragging

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.7.3...3.7.4

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed important bug where attachments that are connected with an edge in a canvas and "Treat edges between file nodes as links" is enabled got corrupted when one of them got moved. (#167 Thank you @oceanst1 for reporting it) - Everyone using version `> 3.6.0` and having "Treat edges between file nodes as links" option enabled, is advised to update ASAP.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.7.2...3.7.3

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Added `Zoom to fit` command (#164)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.7.1...3.7.2

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Added option to enter unclamped zoom mode while presenting (#162)
- Fixed presentation mode slide animation has no effect when zoom gets clamped (#162)
- Fixed presentation mode can get lost when pressing back button on first slide

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.7.0...3.7.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Added "[Image Export](https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas?tab=readme-ov-file#image-export)" feature
- Fixed encapsulate feature not placing the new canvas in the specified default location (#48)
- Improved internal TS-Typings and added some tests

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.6.2...3.7.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Added more data to the metadata cache entry of a .canvas file (e.g. metadata cache per node) (#157)
- Fixed metadata cache events not getting fired when .canvas file got processed (#156)
- Fixed metadata cache not getting reprocessed if canvas file got modified.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.6.1...3.6.2

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Fixed metadata cache support broken in Obsidian version `1.8.3` (#155)
- Fixed metadata cache resolvedLinks using relative paths which caused duplicate graph connections (#155)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.6.0...3.6.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
> [!warning]
> Upgrade to version `3.7.3` to fix this bug: #167

## Changes
- Added full metadata cache support for canvas files (#16, [FR on the Forum](https://forum.obsidian.md/t/canvas-cards-and-notes-in-links-backlinks-and-outgoing-arrows-in-graph-view/49697))
- Added z-ordering controls to the context menu (#117)
- Added settings header info buttons that link to their according readme sections on GitHub.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.5.0...3.6.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added "Flip selection horizontally/vertically"-Command (#147)
- Added shortcut for flipping an edge (#147)
- Fixed open portal cannot be selected on mobile (#150)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.4.1...3.5.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed edges not updating correctly (#148)
- Added "Variable Breakpoint"-Feature (#143)
- Improved border styles for the document shape

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.4.0...3.4.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Massive performance improvements! (#95, #137)
- Better version control due to a new JSON.stringify function (#104)
- Added default value setting for node auto resizing (#138)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.3.1...3.4.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed node auto resizing getting unintentionally applied to file nodes (#127)
- File nodes are now supported by the auto resizing feature (#127)
- Fixed presentation mode animation getting skipped
- Fixed presentation cannot be controlled anymore after entering nested file and navigating back (#134)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.3.0...3.3.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added quicksettings - Use the command panel to quickly adjust any settings
- Improved node auto-resizing (Probably fixing #131)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.2.1...3.3.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed #130, #129, #128

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.2.0...3.2.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added node auto resizing (#45)
- Fixed collapsed group copy not containing its children (#102)
- Added setting to enforce new nodes to be aligned with the grid
- Added option to modify the min node size

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.1.3...3.2.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed moving collapsed group causing corrupted canvas history (#102)
- Added default edge direction setting (#101)
- Added Hot-Reload for portals (#22)
- Fixed clone node command

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.1.2...3.1.3

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed Obsidian `1.7.2` issue where the canvas won't get patched. (#108)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.1.1...3.1.2

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed plugin not working correctly in Obsidian `>1.7.2` (#108)
- Made viewport reset after presentation end optional (#105)
- Added option to disable scaling of canvas content when zoom changes (--zoom-multiplier: 1) (#99)
- Removed performance optimization due to many inconveniences and no real performance gain.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.1.0...3.1.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- New focus mode that blurs all unfocused nodes (#91)
- Brought back old style selection menu as an option (The new style dropdown is now opt-in.) (#88)
- Improvements to the style dropdown menu

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.6...3.1.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fix default node/edge style won't get applied

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.5...3.0.6

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed canvas file created using the command can't be opened (#38)
- Reduced frequency of "styleAttributes" property getting added to nodes (Improves #82)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.4...3.0.5

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added support to automatically fix broken files caused by the core canvas plugin (#82)
- Fixed "center text" node style setting not working properly. (#84)
- Fixed label position for square edges not correct
- Fixed dataset properties for node interaction layer not correctly set

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.3...3.0.4

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Improved "Square" pathfinding method to support more alignments of nodes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.2...3.0.3

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed "Predefined Process" shape not displaying (#76)
- Rewrote edge pathfinding method related scripts and helper scripts

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/3.0.1...3.0.2

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed default node style got applied to non-text nodes

## Changes of 3.0.0
- Rewrite of the node and edge styling system
  - Less cluttered node and edge popup menu
  - Ability to easily add custom styling attributes
- Ability to set node and edge default styles (#74)
- New edge arrow styles (for UML) (#46)
- Option to rotate arrow in the direction of the edge if pathfinding method is "Direct" (#75)
- Replaced some default icons with custom, better ones
- Fixed A* live update setting not working

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.8...3.0.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Rewrite of the node and edge styling system
  - Less cluttered node and edge popup menu
  - Ability to easily add custom styling attributes
- Ability to set node and edge default styles (#74)
- New edge arrow styles (for UML) (#46)
- Option to rotate arrow in the direction of the edge if pathfinding method is "Direct" (#75)
- Replaced some default icons with custom, better ones
- Fixed A* live update setting not working

>[!WARNING]
> It's marked as a pre-release because of the potential inconveniences that can be caused by a migration script. The script shouldn't delete anything, but *could* (but likely won't) corrupt some files (If so, the **files can be restored**)
> **Please report any related bugs as soon as possible.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.8...3.0.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added feature to change slides using PageUp/PageDown keys (#62)
- Added command to end the presentation mode (#64)
- Added command to continue the presentation from the last slide (#64)
- Fixed A* edges having ugly connections with arrowheads (#52)
- Improved settings modal layout

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.7...2.7.8

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Made canvas performance optimization an opt-in feature because of the caused blurring.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.6...2.7.7

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed undo not working correctly on node and edge styles. (#56)
- Added CSS snippet to increase Canvas performance.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.5...2.7.6

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed bug where themed nodes with a custom border style still have a solid outline (#44)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.4...2.7.5

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added border styles for nodes (#44)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.3...2.7.4

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:

- Fixed critical bug where new canvases throw errors (#38) (This time for real 😉)

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added "square" arrow path variant
- Fixed bug where canvas didn't get patched

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.7.0...2.7.1

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added support for properties (currently only "cssclasses")

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.6.6...2.7.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
## Changes
- You can now create new files when adding a file node trough double-clicking or the command (Just like the native dialog) (#15)

## What's Changed
* Added Edge Path Styles (Default, Direct, A*)
* Fixed Interaction With Nodes From Portals
* Fixed Portals Resizing Buggy
* Fixed Sticker Popup Option Visible On Non-Image Files
* Set Default Text Node Size To 260x60 (From 250x60) To Align With The Grid
* Improved Performance
* Added More Canvas Events
* Added Debug Helper
* Changed `advanced-canvas:nodes-changed` Event To `advanced-canvas:node-changed`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.4.2...2.5.0

## What's Changed
* SCSS-Rework -> Better node styling
* Styling of nodes now works by exposing the node's data to the HTML dataset
* Better readonly mode added
* Improved settings screen
* Only show node popup menu items if needed
* Changed internal structure to events

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-advanced-canvas/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: Developer-Mike
releases.description:
Complete rewrite using the "unknown data" property of the node.

**Presentation**
- No dependency on a specific group name for the start slide.
- Hiding the canvas pattern in presentation mode.

**Node shapes**
- Accessible via the modified pop-up menu.
- No longer dependent on comments.

> [!WARNING]
> NOT backwards compatible!

releases.description: First stable release with all initial features.
